<!-- Titanic Survival Prediction Project - Copilot Instructions -->

# Project Setup Checklist

## ✅ Scaffold the Project
- Python data science project with Jupyter notebooks
- Directories: data/, notebooks/, scripts/
- Requirements.txt with all necessary dependencies

## ✅ Customize the Project
- Comprehensive Jupyter notebook with complete analysis pipeline
- Data preprocessing and feature engineering
- Exploratory data analysis with visualizations
- Machine learning classification models
- Model evaluation and performance metrics

## ✅ Install Required Extensions
- Use Python extension (built-in)
- Jupyter extension recommendation: ms-toolsai.jupyter

## Project Details
- **Language**: Python 3.x
- **Type**: Data Science / Machine Learning
- **Dataset**: Titanic - Machine Learning from Disaster
- **Models**: Logistic Regression, Decision Tree
